why: Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:cookie_response must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. The official fixture is ServerboundCookieResponsePacket with an Identifier key and nullable byte-array payload accepted on Login because ServerLoginPacketListener extends ServerCookiePacketListener; this is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not cookie storage policy, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test fails to compile because Stevenarella has no LoginCookieResponse packet variant and the current Protocol 775 Login serverbound version table has no mapping for official packet id 0x04.
stop_boundary: Implement only the Login serverbound cookie_response packet surface and Protocol 775 minecraft:cookie_response / 0x04 packet id mapping needed for the exact oracle test. Do not change official answers, broaden login runtime behavior, infer Configuration entry, add later Login packets, or change cookie storage policy.
